tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Robot Framework test file produces valid, complete documentation output for a Product Owner.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool produces visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework
At least one test case is captured in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case is properly named

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - Template data-driven expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Robot Framework template test is expanded into one separate test entry per data row in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool produces visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework
Each data row in the template is represented as its own test case

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case is properly named

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - FOR loop expands one test per value
tests.description: Verifies that a Robot Framework test using a FOR loop is expanded into one separate test entry per loop value in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool produces visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework
Each iteration value in the FOR loop is represented as its own test case

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case is properly named

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Robot Framework test file produces valid documentation including a populated coverage matrix for a QA Manager.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool produces visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework
At least one test case is captured in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case is properly named

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Robot Framework template is collapsed into a single test entry with a coverage matrix row per data example in the QA Manager output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool produces visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework
Multiple data rows are collapsed into a single test case rather than expanded

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test case is properly named

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row from the template appears as a separate row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'robot'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row contains the expected fields for Robot Framework tests

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - QAM - FOR loop collapses
tests.description: Verifies that Robot Framework tests using FOR loops are collapsed into a smaller number of test entries with coverage matrix rows per loop value in the QA Manager output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool produces visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework
FOR loop iterations are collapsed so only 2 top-level test entries appear

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each collapsed test case is properly named

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each loop value appears as a separate row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'robot'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row contains the expected fields for Robot Framework tests
